title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at VMware India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at VMware India
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
